text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oguri, happy birthday! We're throwin' a party
soon as we get back to the dorms, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, I said party, but we got no funds, so you're
gettin' the Tamamo family special!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Gotta cut costs, so we'll cut up flyers 'n' paint 'em
to hang up. Grub'll be whatev's cheapest at the
market today. How 'bout it, over the moon?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Mh-hmm, I'm so... excited. I've never... felt so
happy...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, were you even listenin' just now? I'm out
here plottin' to stuff ya with cheap rice 'n' side
dishes. Whatcha so happy 'bout?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Because you planned this all for me... I guess?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You're as outta it as ever. What if I told ya,
"We're fastin' for your birthday!"? Wouldja still be
happy?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
F-fasting?! Ugh, but... You know me better than
myself, Tama. If fasting is how you celebrate,
then... I'm... overjoyed!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Dummy, I was just tryna pull one over ya!
Yeesh, I'll whip up some fish for ya as an apology.
Might even grab some eel...
